_meta.description: Registry of public contracts (interfaces, types, HTTP endpoints, signal events) exposed by each Node. Derived from relationships.json exposes.contracts but expanded with kind, package, and status. Use this before writing code that crosses a Node boundary to find the exact interface to depend on.

interfaces.name: IGridContext
interfaces.description: Distributed context with correlation, causation, and baggage. Present in every scoped operation.

interfaces.name: IGridContextAccessor
interfaces.description: Ambient accessor for IGridContext — resolves the current context from the call chain.

interfaces.name: INodeContext
interfaces.description: Static node-scoped metadata singleton — NodeId, NodeName, environment.

interfaces.name: IOperationContext
interfaces.description: Scoped per logical operation. Created at entry points (HTTP, message, job).

interfaces.name: IOperationContextAccessor
interfaces.description: Ambient accessor for IOperationContext.

interfaces.name: IStartupHook
interfaces.description: Lifecycle extension point — runs during Node startup before serving traffic.

interfaces.name: IShutdownHook
interfaces.description: Lifecycle extension point — runs during graceful shutdown.

interfaces.name: INodeLifecycle
interfaces.description: Aggregated lifecycle coordinator — manages startup and shutdown hooks.

interfaces.name: IHealthContributor
interfaces.description: Plugs into the health aggregation pipeline (/health endpoint).

interfaces.name: IReadinessContributor
interfaces.description: Plugs into the readiness aggregation pipeline (/ready endpoint).

interfaces.name: ITraceEnricher
interfaces.description: Adds custom tags/attributes to OpenTelemetry spans.

interfaces.name: ILogScopeFactory
interfaces.description: Creates structured log scopes enriched with GridContext.

interfaces.name: ITelemetryActivityFactory
interfaces.description: Creates Activity instances for trace spans, pre-enriched with GridContext.

interfaces.name: IAgentExecutionContext
interfaces.description: LLM agent execution context — extends IOperationContext with agent identity and scope.

interfaces.name: CorrelationId
interfaces.description: ULID-based strongly-typed correlation ID. Never null in a live GridContext.

interfaces.name: NodeId
interfaces.description: ULID-based strongly-typed Node identity.

interfaces.name: TenantId
interfaces.description: ULID-based strongly-typed tenant identity.

interfaces.name: ProjectId
interfaces.description: ULID-based strongly-typed project identity.

interfaces.name: RunId
interfaces.description: ULID-based strongly-typed run identity.

interfaces.name: StudioId
interfaces.description: ULID-based strongly-typed studio identity.

interfaces.name: ITransportPublisher
interfaces.description: Publish messages to a broker. Transport-agnostic.

interfaces.name: ITransportConsumer
interfaces.description: Consume messages from a broker. Transport-agnostic.

interfaces.name: IMessageHandler<T>
interfaces.description: Implement to handle a specific message type. Registered via DI.

interfaces.name: ITransportEnvelope
interfaces.description: Wraps a message with routing metadata, GridContext, and retry state.

interfaces.name: ISecretStore
interfaces.description: Read secrets by name. Always resolves latest version — no pinning (invariant 21).

interfaces.name: IConfigProvider
interfaces.description: Read typed configuration values from the shared App Configuration store.

interfaces.name: IVaultClient
interfaces.description: Low-level Vault client. Prefer ISecretStore for application code.

interfaces.name: ISecretProvider
interfaces.description: Provider slot interface — implement to add a new secret backend (Azure KV, AWS, File, InMemory).

interfaces.name: IConfigSource
interfaces.description: Provider slot interface — implement to add a new configuration source.

interfaces.name: IRotator
interfaces.description: Implement per secret type to define rotation logic. Called by the rotation Azure Function.

interfaces.name: RotationResult
interfaces.description: Outcome of a rotation attempt — new secret value, version, and audit metadata.

interfaces.name: IAuthenticatedIdentityAccessor
interfaces.description: Resolves the authenticated identity from the current GridContext/IOperationContext.

interfaces.name: IAuthorizationPolicy
interfaces.description: Define authorization requirements. Auth validates JWT tokens against policies.

interfaces.name: AuthenticationResult
interfaces.description: Result of JWT validation — success/failure, claims, identity.

interfaces.name: AuthorizationDecision
interfaces.description: Result of a policy evaluation — allow/deny, reason.

interfaces.name: ApiResult<T>
interfaces.description: Standard success response envelope — data, metadata, correlation ID.

interfaces.name: ApiResult
interfaces.description: Non-generic variant for void responses.

interfaces.name: ApiErrorResponse
interfaces.description: Standard error envelope — error code, message, correlation ID. Mapped from exceptions.

interfaces.name: IRepository<T>
interfaces.description: Generic repository pattern — CRUD over a tenant-aware data store.

interfaces.name: IUnitOfWork
interfaces.description: Coordinates transactions across repositories. Commit, rollback, scoped lifetime.

interfaces.name: IOutboxStore
interfaces.description: Transactional outbox — stores messages within a database transaction for exactly-once delivery via Transport.

interfaces.name: ITraceSink
interfaces.description: Receive trace spans from the OTLP collector. Implement to add a new telemetry backend.

interfaces.name: ILogSink
interfaces.description: Receive structured log entries.

interfaces.name: IMetricsSink
interfaces.description: Receive metric data points.

interfaces.name: INotificationSender
interfaces.description: Send a notification — channel-agnostic. Resolves to the appropriate gateway (email, SMS) based on notification type.

interfaces.name: INotificationGateway
interfaces.description: Provider slot — implement to add a new delivery channel (Resend, SMTP, Twilio, etc.).

interfaces.name: IChatClient
interfaces.description: Normalized chat completion contract. Aligned with Microsoft.Extensions.AI (Q3 2026 adoption planned).

interfaces.name: IEmbeddingGenerator
interfaces.description: Generate text embeddings. Aligned with Microsoft.Extensions.AI.

interfaces.name: IModelProvider
interfaces.description: Provider slot — implement per model backend (OpenAI, Anthropic, Azure OpenAI, local/ONNX).

interfaces.name: IModelRouter
interfaces.description: Routes inference requests to the most appropriate model/provider based on policy, capability, cost, and runtime constraints.

interfaces.name: IRoutingPolicy
interfaces.description: Declares the policy inputs and decision rules used by model routing (quality tier, latency, cost, residency, fallback).

interfaces.name: IModelCapabilityDeclaration
interfaces.description: Describes a model's declared capabilities and constraints so routing can match requests to supported providers.

interfaces.name: IInferenceResult
interfaces.description: Normalized inference response — content, tokens in/out, model ID, latency, cost estimate.

interfaces.name: IAgent
interfaces.description: Core agent interface — identity, capability declarations, execution entry point.

interfaces.name: IAgentExecutionContext
interfaces.description: Agents-owned execution context extending Kernel's IAgentExecutionContext with AI-specific bindings (memory refs, tool bindings).

interfaces.name: IAgentLifecycle
interfaces.description: Lifecycle hooks for agents: register → initialize → execute → complete → decommission.

interfaces.name: IToolInvoker
interfaces.description: How agents call tools — resolves through Capabilities' tool registry.

interfaces.name: IAgentMemory
interfaces.description: Memory read/write from the agent's perspective — backed by Memory Node storage.

interfaces.name: IMemoryStore
interfaces.description: Write, read, search, delete agent memories. Scoped by TenantId/ProjectId/AgentId.

interfaces.name: IMemoryScope
interfaces.description: Scoped memory access — an agent only sees its authorized memories through this interface.

interfaces.name: IMemorySummarizer
interfaces.description: Compress memories beyond a token threshold. Delegates embedding to AI Node.

interfaces.name: IKnowledgeStore
interfaces.description: Ingest, query, and delete knowledge sources.

interfaces.name: IDocumentIngester
interfaces.description: Parse and chunk documents into retrievable units, generate embeddings via AI.

interfaces.name: IRetrievalPipeline
interfaces.description: Query → ranked results with source attribution. Used for RAG workflows.

interfaces.name: IKnowledgeSource
interfaces.description: Metadata about an ingested source — origin URL, version, last updated timestamp.

interfaces.name: IEvalRunner
interfaces.description: Run a prompt evaluation set and return scored results.

interfaces.name: IEvalScorer
interfaces.description: Score an inference result against expected criteria.

interfaces.name: IEvalSuite
interfaces.description: A named collection of evaluation cases with expected outputs and scoring criteria.

interfaces.name: ICapabilityRegistry
interfaces.description: Discover and resolve available tools by name and version.

interfaces.name: ICapability
interfaces.description: A registered tool — schema, version, executor, permission requirements.

interfaces.name: ICapabilityPermission
interfaces.description: Authorization gate for a capability — checked before execution.

interfaces.name: IWorkflow
interfaces.description: A named multi-step pipeline — steps, inputs, outputs, compensation logic.

interfaces.name: IWorkflowEngine
interfaces.description: Execute, resume, and compensate workflows.

interfaces.name: IWorkflowStep
interfaces.description: A single unit of work within a workflow — execute, compensate, retry policy.

interfaces.name: IApprovalGate
interfaces.description: Require human approval before an agent action proceeds.

interfaces.name: ICircuitBreaker
interfaces.description: Halt agent or workflow execution when safety thresholds are breached.

interfaces.name: ICostController
interfaces.description: Enforce per-agent and per-tenant inference cost limits.

interfaces.name: IAuditLog
interfaces.description: Immutable record of agent actions, decisions, and approvals.

interfaces.name: ISimulator
interfaces.description: Run a simulated execution of a plan or workflow and return risk analysis.

interfaces.name: ISimulationResult
interfaces.description: Outcome of a simulation — steps executed, risks identified, confidence score.
